title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #10, Oden, Ashura Doji, Unknown person #11 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was a hellish land, filled with the stench of corpses...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But often used his over- whitming might...

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: TO ROUNDUP ALL THE RuffIANS OF KURI...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and turned that well into a peaceful and prosperous place for its inhabitants.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: only he would be able to do something like this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Having heard of his remarkable exploits...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shogun Kozuki Sukiyaki reversed his decision to disown open.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He then declared his son Daimyo of Kuri.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our very own LORD open is going to become...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with this, Kuri will become a proper region!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is hard to believe....!! This is finally happening after all that hard work!!

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: Well, this is the first time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I have seen what PEACE looks like...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...although, now that you mention it... a Daimyo requires retainers!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would rather not have some uptight officials following me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GWAAH!! Get off me!! Your shot is dripping everywhere!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The survivors of the legendary rocks pirates started recruiting.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They would eventually become the beacons of power for the next generation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Or are they just hairy people??

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who are these two figures that have washed ashore...?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 42 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
